errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Auraxis should look on your device.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language shown across the app.

biometric.label: Biometric lock
biometric.description: Require Face ID, Touch ID or fingerprint when reopening the app and for sensitive actions.
biometric.unavailable: Biometrics not available on this device.
biometric.notEnrolled: Enroll Face ID / Touch ID in system settings to enable.

captcha.label: Security check
captcha.error: Could not verify. Please try again shortly.
captcha.missing: Complete the security check before continuing.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your private area and continue your financial routine with confidence.

resendConfirmation.title: Resend confirmation email
resendConfirmation.description: We will send a new confirmation link to the email below.
resendConfirmation.success: Done! Check your inbox and spam folder.

confirmEmail.wait: We're validating the confirmation link. This may take a few seconds.
confirmEmail.successDescription: Your account is ready. Welcome to Auraxis.
confirmEmail.errorDescription: The link may have expired or already been used. Asking for a new one usually fixes it.
confirmEmail.noTokenDescription: This page opens automatically when you tap the link in the email we sent you. Tap below to receive a new one.

export.title: Export transactions
export.description: Pick a format; we generate the file and open share.
export.success: Ready! Use share to send or save.

plans.title: Auraxis plans
plans.subtitle: Pick the one that fits your financial journey.

free.description: Great to start organising your money.

premium.description: Everything in Free plus advanced tools and priority support.

empty.title: No plans available
empty.description: Come back later — we're refreshing the catalog.

success.title: Payment confirmed!
success.description: Your plan is active. Welcome to Auraxis Premium.

cancel.title: Payment not completed
cancel.description: Your subscription was not activated. You can try again whenever you like.

return.pendingNotice: We are confirming the payment with the gateway. Activation may take a few minutes.
return.errorNotice: The processor returned an error. Try again shortly or contact support.

monthSummary.title: Monthly summary
monthSummary.description: Income, expenses and balance for the selected period.

quickAdd.title: Quick entry
quickAdd.description: Create a transaction with just 4 fields.

upcomingDue.title: Upcoming due
upcomingDue.description: Pending transactions in the next 7 days.

paymentsAssistant.title: Open items
paymentsAssistant.statusHint: Marking here only updates the status in Auraxis — no real money moves.
paymentsAssistant.emptyBody: You have no open bills overdue by more than a month.
paymentsAssistant.confirmDelete: Are you sure? You can undo right after.
